name_en: BOITE CHAPEAU SOUPLE New Large Soft Cake
name_cn:
BOITE CHAPEAU SOUPLE New Large Soft Cake
CDDE:M45747【Exclusive Quality】
👜Size:20*22.5*8cm
As a classic series, it has become a "must-have bag masterpiece"
The Soft Cake is a versatile style with a classic retro look.
The strap is flexibly adjustable, and the capacity is impressive.
Perfect for daily wear; excellent for casual or office commuting.
This round cake is a beauty that you'll love the more you carry it—definitely a versatile choice you won't regret!
